title: scaphyglottis minuta
intro: Scaphyglottis minuta, also known as the tiny scaphyglottis, is a type of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Scaphyglottis minuta include relief from congestion, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate stress. Herbal preparations of Scaphyglottis minuta can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and rhizomes to create a tincture or extract.
